Bedford.notes: Dense urban core with mixed residential/commercial infrastructure; benefit from higher hazard weighting.

Beechville.notes: Suburban area with notable tree canopy; higher wind-tree interaction risk.

Lower Sackville.notes: Mixed suburban/lowland characteristics; default profile weights are a good fit.

Dartmouth.notes: Urban harbour community with dense infrastructure and mixed risk factors.

Downtown Halifax.notes: Highest-density urban area; hazard exposure dominates with critical infrastructure concentration.

Clayton Park.notes: Established suburban neighbourhood; default weights appropriate.

Timberlea.notes: Tree-lined suburban community; elevated wind-tree interaction risk.

Cole Harbour.notes: Coastal harbour community with lowland and wind-tree exposure; higher historical prior for sparse outage data.

Spryfield.notes: Mixed urban-rural fringe with lowland areas; default profile is suitable.

Eastern Passage.notes: Coastal community on Eastern Shore; rain/lowland and historical data contribute significantly.

Fall River.notes: Forest-adjacent suburban community; notable wind-tree risk along power corridors.

Hammonds Plains.notes: Wooded suburban area with legacy overhead lines; tree exposure elevated.

Sambro.notes: Coastal fishing village at harbour entrance; high exposure to coastal storm factors.

Tantallon.notes: Suburban fringe with significant tree cover and overhead infrastructure.

Musquodoboit Harbour.notes: Rural coastal harbour; limited outage history increases historical prior importance.
